title: I analyzed 100 losing trades… AI didn’t fix them, rules did
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
I reviewed \~100 losing trades recently.

Expected to find complex issues.

It wasn’t.

It was the same things over and over:

* entering before confirmation
* trading weak breakouts
* forcing setups that weren’t there

Nothing “smart” was needed to fix this.

Just rules.

So I defined:

* wait for clean break
* wait for retest
* wait for strong close

If one is missing → skip.

That alone removed a big chunk of bad trades.

Then I asked:

“How do I make sure I actually follow this?”

Because that’s the real problem.

So I built a small AI-based tool that checks these conditions on charts automatically.

Not to predict.

Just to filter.

Honestly, that helped more than any indicator I’ve used.

If you're building things around this idea:  
[https://herculmarket.com](https://herculmarket.com/)
